name: snk-devcenter
description: Marketplace de skills oficiais do DevCenter Sankhya.

plugins.name: addon-studio
plugins.description: Plugin Sankhya Addon Studio 2.0 com 18 skills focadas (entity, repository, controller, data-dictionary, database, mapstruct, test, action-button, business-rule, job, type-adapter, value, controller-advice, dependency-injection, macros, encoding, build, addon-studio) e 6 sub-agents (addon-reviewer, entity-architect, controller-designer, test-writer, troubleshooter, dbscript-builder). Convencao de nomenclatura parametrizada por projeto.
